details.reasoning: The implementation fully meets all rubric requirements. A complete new provider package 'pixelart' is created under packages/ with proper package.json structure and exports. The createPixelArt factory function is correctly exported and returns a PixelArtProvider object with image/imageModel methods. The PixelArtImageModel class correctly implements ImageModelV3 with the doGenerate method (the correct interface method for image models in AI SDK v3, not generateImage). Image settings properly support size, style enum with 'pixel', 'retro', and '8bit' values, and pixelDensity (1-4 range). Base URL is correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'. The package structure mirrors existing AI SDK providers with proper TypeScript configuration, tsup build config, comprehensive vitest tests, error handling, and version management. The diff shows only new files created with no modifications to existing providers. Tests comprehensively verify all functionality including parameter passing, style/pixelDensity support, unsupported feature warnings, error handling, and metadata inclusion.
